overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage featuring the Red Hood character traversing a rain-soaked Gotham City at night. The character walks through neon-lit intersections, crosses an elevated bridge, and navigates alleys and sidewalks in a cinematic game environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with commercial buildings and billboards

events.description: scene brightens from dark opening to reveal the rainy neon-lit city environment
character transitions from standing to walking forward through the intersection

agents.ego_description: Red Hood character walks through the wet intersection, passing illuminated storefronts and billboards while heading toward the bridge structure

entered.detail: Corner diner with yellow signage and striped awning
Large illuminated billboard with blue and red advertising
Rain-slicked street with white crosswalk lines reflecting neon lights
Massive steel bridge framework spanning the street ahead

segments.scene_description: The clip opens in a dark urban intersection that brightens to reveal a rainy Gotham City night. The Red Hood character walks through wet asphalt crosswalks past a corner diner and illuminated billboards, heading toward a large industrial bridge structure in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street approaching elevated bridge walkway

events.description: moving from open intersection to industrial area beneath the bridge structure
character begins ascending wide stone stairs to reach the bridge walkway

agents.ego_description: Character walks past a burger shop and scattered pedestrians, then climbs the stone staircase leading up to the bridge walkway

notable_agents.action: woman in gray coat walking past the character on the sidewalk

entered.detail: Fast food restaurant with red and white striped awning and signage
Wide stone stairs with metal railings leading up to bridge level
Ornate black metal railing along the bridge approach

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the open intersection into a more enclosed industrial area beneath the bridge. After passing a burger shop and pedestrians, the character ascends a wide stone staircase flanked by ornate metal railings to reach the elevated bridge walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated bridge walkway with gothic stone architecture

events.description: reaching the top of stairs onto the cobblestone bridge deck between stone towers
character descends narrow stairs into the alleyway below

agents.ego_description: Character traverses the wet cobblestone bridge walkway between gothic towers, then descends into a narrow brick-lined alleyway

entered.detail: Tall stone towers with arched windows and decorative metal frameworks
Wet cobblestone surface reflecting the ambient city lights
Narrow stone stairs descending between high brick walls
Weathered brick wall lining the narrow alley passage

segments.scene_description: The character walks across an elevated bridge deck with wet cobblestones between imposing gothic stone towers. The environment is moody and enclosed, transitioning to a descent down narrow stairs into a brick-lined alleyway.

scene_state.functional_zone: street under bridge overpass with hospital building

events.description: exits narrow alley to open street beneath the bridge overpass
character pauses to look up at the underside of the bridge structure

agents.ego_description: Character emerges from the alley, pauses under the bridge overpass to survey the surroundings, then continues walking past a fire hydrant toward the hospital building

notable_agents.action: sedan driving past on the wet street under the overpass

entered.detail: Massive concrete and steel bridge passing overhead with structural beams visible
Red fire hydrant on the sidewalk corner
Building with illuminated signage reading MERCY GENERAL

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow alley, the character emerges onto a street beneath the bridge overpass. The character pauses to look up at the infrastructure while a car passes by, then continues past a red fire hydrant toward the Mercy General Hospital building.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with bus stop shelter

events.description: approaching illuminated bus stop shelter with advertisement display

agents.ego_description: Character walks steadily along the sidewalk passing street trees, stone stairs, and approaching a bus shelter with an illuminated advertisement

notable_agents.action: man standing on the sidewalk ahead near the bus stop

entered.detail: Glass and metal bus shelter with illuminated advertisement reading WE WANT ALL YOUR MONEY
Orange and white striped traffic barrel on the sidewalk
Wide stone staircase with metal railings leading up to building entrance

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the urban sidewalk, passing under streetlights and approaching a bus stop shelter with a glowing advertisement. The environment features stone staircases, construction barrels, and scattered pedestrians in the misty night air.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-soaked urban landscape that shifts from open neon-lit intersections to enclosed gothic architecture and back into a misty city street. It begins in a dark intersection that brightens to reveal wet asphalt and illuminated billboards as the Red Hood character walks past a corner diner toward a distant industrial bridge. As the character moves into the enclosed space beneath the bridge, the scene transitions from a burger shop and pedestrian crowds to an ascent up ornate stone staircases onto an elevated walkway. The camera then follows the character across wet cobblestones between imposing gothic towers before descending through a narrow brick-lined alleyway and emerging beneath a massive bridge overpass. Finally, the environment opens back up into a misty street where the character passes a red fire hydrant and a glowing bus stop shelter while heading toward the Mercy General Hospital building.
